Title: Activate GPlan with Device (Android) via CRM
Detailed Steps: Log in to the CRM system. | Navigate to the subscriber plan activation section. | Select 'GPlan with Device' and choose an Android device from the available options. | Complete the activation process for the subscriber.
ExpectedResult:
1. GPlan with Device is successfully activated for the subscriber.
2. The selected Android device is assigned to the subscriber's account.
3. An SMS alert 'You have successfully subscribed to GPlan with Device.' is sent to the subscriber.
Test Data: Sample data or mock values needed for execution.

Title: Validate Monthly Plan Recalculation for GPlan with Device
Detailed Steps: Log in to the CRM system and initiate GPlan with Device activation. | Select a GPlan and an initial device (e.g., Device A). | Observe the displayed total monthly plan cost. | Change the selected device to a different one (e.g., Device B). | Observe the updated total monthly plan cost.
ExpectedResult:
1. The total monthly plan cost is dynamically recalculated and displayed based on the initially selected device.
2. The total monthly plan cost is dynamically recalculated and updated correctly when a different device is selected.
3. The recalculation accurately reflects the base plan cost plus the selected device's cost.
Test Data: Sample data or mock values needed for execution.

Title: Validate No Device Cost Liner in Summary for GPlan PLUS (SIM-Only)
Detailed Steps: Log in to the CRM system and initiate GPlan PLUS (SIM-Only) activation. | Proceed to the plan summary or confirmation page. | Review the detailed breakdown of the monthly plan cost.
ExpectedResult:
1. The monthly plan summary clearly shows the base plan cost.
2. The monthly plan summary does not include any separate line item or cost component related to a device.

Title: Verify Real-time Monitoring of Prepaid Subscriber Data Consumption
Detailed Steps: Provision a prepaid subscriber with a data plan. | Initiate data usage on the subscriber's device. | Access the PCRF or relevant monitoring system to view data consumption. | Observe the data usage display as data is consumed.
ExpectedResult:
1. The system (via PCRF) accurately monitors and displays the prepaid subscriber's data consumption in real-time.
2. The reported data usage updates dynamically as the subscriber consumes data.
Test Data: Sample data or mock values needed for execution.

Title: Verify Data Throttling to 128 Kbps Upon Data Cap Exhaustion
Detailed Steps: Provision a prepaid subscriber with a data plan with a defined data cap. | Consume data until the data cap is fully exhausted. | Attempt to access internet services (e.g., browse a webpage, run a speed test).
ExpectedResult:
1. Once the data cap is fully exhausted, the subscriber's data throughput is automatically throttled to 128 Kbps.
2. Data services remain accessible, but at the reduced speed (no hard block).
Test Data: Sample data or mock values needed for execution.

Title: Verify Throttling is Lifted After Plan Renewal or Top-up
Detailed Steps: Ensure a prepaid subscriber's data is currently throttled due to cap exhaustion. | Perform a plan renewal or apply a data top-up to the subscriber's account. | Attempt to access internet services (e.g., browse a webpage, run a speed test).
ExpectedResult:
1. Upon successful plan renewal or application of a top-up, the throttling is automatically lifted.
2. The subscriber's data throughput returns to the normal speed defined by their active plan.
3. Data services are accessible at the normal speed.
Test Data: Sample data or mock values needed for execution.

Title: Verify Threshold-based Notification Sent at Data Consumption Threshold (e.g., 80%)
Detailed Steps: Provision a prepaid subscriber with a data plan and configure a data consumption threshold (e.g., 80%). | Consume data until the subscriber's usage reaches the configured threshold. | Check the subscriber's device for incoming SMS notifications.
ExpectedResult:
1. An SMS notification is automatically sent to the subscriber when their data consumption reaches the configured threshold (e.g., 80%).
2. The notification content is informative (e.g., 'You have used 80% of your data. Top-up now!').
Test Data: Sample data or mock values needed for execution.

Title: Verify No Hard Block on Data Access After Data Cap Exhaustion
Detailed Steps: Provision a prepaid subscriber with a data plan and exhaust the data cap, ensuring throttling is active. | Attempt to access various internet services (e.g., load a simple webpage, send a message via a low-bandwidth app).
ExpectedResult: 1. The subscriber is able to access internet services, confirming that there is no hard block on data access, only throttling to 128 Kbps.
Test Data: Sample data or mock values needed for execution.
